name: QuickBooks Online
description: Connects to QuickBooks Online (QBO) via the Intuit v3 REST API to sync invoices, customers, and accounts into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: Your Intuit app Client ID. Find it in the Intuit Developer Portal under your app's Keys & OAuth section.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: Your Intuit app Client Secret. This is stored encrypted and never shown again after saving.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: The OAuth2 redirect URI registered in your Intuit app. Leave blank to use the Intuit OAuth2 Playground default.

methods.name: Install / Validate Credentials
methods.description: Validates that client_id and client_secret are present. If an access token is already available, verifies it against the QBO company info endpoint.

methods.name: Get Authorization URL
methods.description: Returns the Intuit OAuth2 consent URL. Redirect the user to this URL to initiate the OAuth2 flow.

methods.name: Exchange Authorization Code
methods.description: Exchanges the OAuth2 authorization code (and realm_id) received from Intuit's callback for access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: Refresh Access Token
methods.description: Uses the stored refresh token to obtain a new access token from Intuit.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Verifies connectivity by calling GET /companyinfo/{realm_id} and returns HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Full Sync
methods.description: Fetches invoices, customers, and accounts from QBO and normalizes them into ConnectorDocuments.

methods.name: List Customers
methods.description: Runs SELECT * FROM Customer MAXRESULTS {max_results} against the QBO query API.

methods.name: Get Customer
methods.description: Retrieve a single QBO customer by ID.

methods.name: List Invoices
methods.description: Runs SELECT * FROM Invoice MAXRESULTS {max_results} against the QBO query API.

methods.name: Get Invoice
methods.description: Retrieve a single QBO invoice by ID.

methods.name: List Accounts
methods.description: Runs SELECT * FROM Account MAXRESULTS {max_results} against the QBO query API.
